Localization.Description: A malicious object is found and cured within five minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Malicious object {object.storage.name} is found and cured within five minutes on host {dst.host}
Malicious object {object.storage.name} is found and quarantined within five minutes on host {dst.host}
Malicious object {object.storage.name} is found and removed within five minutes on host {dst.host}
